title: マイルCS南部杯の後に・迷うからこそ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hokko Tarumae's comeback race comes to a
close. The thunderous applause dies down, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap, clap...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: Thank you... everyone. Really... thank you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Scattered among the crowd, some audience
members continue to clap. The sound is pure and
warm, celebrating Hokko Tarumae's return.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Tarumae. I noticed when we were out there,
but your break doesn't seem to have affected
your form much.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: It felt like you were running how you always do.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Oh... you think? My instincts felt a little off,
though. I couldn't help but feel a little ashamed
or... regretful, I guess.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
If I had gotten back on my feet quicker and
thrown myself into training, I would've been able
to run so much better!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
I was acting silly... If my old self were here in front
of me, I'd give her a big smack in the head!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Pfft... heh heh, ahahaha! ☆

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: Rickey? Did I say something funny?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: No, I just remembered something.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
You got mad at me just like that, once. When you
said I should quit being distracted by feng shui
and just devote myself to running.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: Ah... I'm sorry, Rickey. I was too harsh, back then.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
No, it's fine. You're always serious, no matter who
you're talking to. You're as strict on me as you
are on yourself.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: ...But!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: But?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It's not a bad thing that you hit a dead end for a
while. Sometimes we need to take a break in
order to strengthen our foundations. ♪

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
From the outside, it might look like you've
stopped. But really, you're just taking the time to
make sure you get your next step right.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: That's how we achieve harmony and improve! ♪

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
So you don't need to rush! Next time, come out
and show us an even stronger Tarumae!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Definitely! I'll regain my form and blaze
past even you, Rickey!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After returning to Tracen Academy, the two of
them get to talking about what comes next.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I can't wait, Trainer! ☆ I wanna get back on the
track and race again right now!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
I feel the same! I want to hurry and show the fans
in my hometown that I'm back in top form!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Feeling pressured from both sides, I ponder over
what would be the best race for them to face off
again.
choice_data_list: How about the JBC Classic in early November?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The JBC Classic? That's in a month. It's the
longest race out of the JBC series, right?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: How about it, Tarumae?!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Sounds good! Should we enter the JBC Sprint
too?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Nah! One race at a time, please!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: Got it! We'll keep to the JBC Classic, then!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text: Nice! I'll see you both there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Out of nowhere, another Umamusume hops into
the conversation.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Acute?! How long have you been here?!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
I wooonder. Was it just a few seconds, or was I
here from the very start?

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Either way, Rickey, Tarumae, you're not going to
leave me out, are you?

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
It'll be so lonely just watching the race from
home.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Ah, sorry! I should've said something to you at the
Nambu Hai!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Let's do it then! All three of us!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Nothing better than a friendly rivalry!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Thanks. I don't know about the friendly part,
though.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text: I'm going to "epic own" the two of you out there, as the underclassmen like to say. Whoof!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Wonder Acute lets out an intimidating huff. With
this, the leading roles are all filled.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the next race, the JBC Classic, the three of
them will reunite on the track.
